hero.title: Welcome to
hero.subtitle: Your trusted cannabis club. Join our community and experience premium quality products with professional service.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Gran Kush is a private non-profit association in central Torrevieja. We build a safe cultural space for connection, relaxation, and a responsible approach to cannabis.

quality.title: Quality and responsibility
quality.description: We share up-to-date information about strains, harm reduction, and mindful use.

community.title: Community
community.description: Regular meetups, themed evenings, and cultural events bring members together in a respectful atmosphere.

service.title: Club format
service.description: Access is members-only. We do not advertise or sell products.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.description: Join Gran Kush today and become part of our community. Register now to get started.
